AppPreview.heading: See what you're stepping into
AppPreview.description: Explore the screens exactly as they appear in Parfect — before you even download.

HomeScreen.ariaLabel: Parfect home screen with tonight's prompt and quick actions
HomeScreen.promptQuestion: What's one small thing your partner did lately that made you feel loved?

ChatScreen.ariaLabel: Parfect private chat screen with an intimate conversation
ChatScreen.message1: Tonight, after the kids are asleep… I have a surprise for you
ChatScreen.message2: Now I can't stop thinking about it 😏
ChatScreen.message3: Good. Wear that smile I love.

FantasiesScreen.ariaLabel: Parfect fantasies screen with tonight's prompt and an invite
FantasiesScreen.title: Fantasies
FantasiesScreen.promptQuestion: What's a fantasy you've never said out loud?
FantasiesScreen.invitePreview: "Something I've been imagining for our anniversary…"
FantasiesScreen.bucketListAdded: A weekend away, no plans — it's now on your bucket list.

TogetherScreen.ariaLabel: Parfect together screen with an upcoming date and bucket list
TogetherScreen.title: Together
